name: Lara Croft
description:
|Alright, since Disney series is over, it's time for the Tomb Raider series. I play the game a lot so I might as well make some scenarios right? So to start off the Tomb Raider series, we have to have the main character lol. Mommy Lara is here for yall ong ong😈. Also this is WLW, so for the lesbians and whatever. If you want a MLW, just ask in the comments lol.|

*"Everyone's left me except for you."*

\Side note: If yall wanna comment and/or make private chats I can further see how she acts. It matters most to me in that way so I can improve my bots thoroughly./
creator: R@GE
